tools.name: read_xmind
tools.description: Parse and analyze XMind files with multiple capabilities including extracting nodes, relationships, callouts, and summaries.

tools.name: list_xmind_directory
tools.description: Comprehensive XMind file discovery and analysis tool, including recursive scanning, filtering, and searching.

tools.name: read_multiple_xmind_files
tools.description: Advanced multi-file analysis and correlation tool, including simultaneous processing of multiple files.

tools.name: search_xmind_files
tools.description: Advanced file search tool with recursive capabilities, including case-insensitive searching and filtering.

tools.name: extract_node
tools.description: Smart node extraction with fuzzy path matching, including full context and hierarchy information.

tools.name: extract_node_by_id
tools.description: Extract a specific node and its subtree using its unique ID, preserving all properties and relationships.

tools.name: search_nodes
tools.description: Advanced node search with multiple criteria, including searching through titles, notes, labels, callouts, and tasks.
